channel.title: Frontity release: Make @frontity/mars-theme AMP-aware
channel.description:
# Features
* As part of the [AMP feature](https://community.frontity.org/t/amp-package/388), we have made [`@frontity/mars-theme`](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/tree/dev/packages/mars-theme) package AMP-aware. This means that, if you are using the [`@frontity/amp`](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/tree/dev/packages/amp) package and you install this theme, it just works. [#825](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/825)
# Fixes
* Fix problem with CDNs that return the same HTML response for URLs with same queries in different order. [#850](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/850) * Add the `.DS_Store` files to the list of files that a directory where you want to run `npx frontity create` can contain. [#841](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/841)
--- # Credits
Huge thanks to **[@michalczaplinski](https://github.com/michalczaplinski) and [@luisherranz](https://github.com/luisherranz)** for helping on this release! :tada:
--- # Packages changelog --- ## `@frontity/core@1.14.3`
### Patch Changes
* [`e5ca6cd7`](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/commit/e5ca6cd7d1c3562c04ff6371fb895be1a3558cff) [#850](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/850) Thanks [@luisherranz](https://github.com/luisherranz)! - Fix problem with CDNs that return the same HTML response for URLs with same queries in different order.
--- ## frontity@1.16.1
### Patch Changes
* [`ba161a58`](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/commit/ba161a58ca6759c1209f926af28f8b3aba141476) [#841](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/841) Thanks [@michalczaplinski](https://github.com/michalczaplinski)! - Add the `.DS_Store` files to the list of files that a directory where you want to run `npx frontity create` can contain.
--- ## `@frontity/mars-theme@1.6.0`
### Minor Changes
* [`facd9b2e`](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/commit/facd9b2e682effaa9d023378f7798afcaa18b615) [#825](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/825) Thanks [@michalczaplinski](https://github.com/michalczaplinski)! - Make the mars-theme "AMP-aware" and clean up the theme to pass the AMP html-validator checks.
--- ## `@frontity/tiny-router@1.4.3`
### Patch Changes
* [`e5ca6cd7`](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/commit/e5ca6cd7d1c3562c04ff6371fb895be1a3558cff) [#850](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/850) Thanks [@luisherranz](https://github.com/luisherranz)! - Fix problem with CDNs that return the same HTML response for URLs with same queries in different order.

item.title: Frontity release: Make @frontity/mars-theme AMP-aware
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Features

  • As part of the AMP feature, we have made @frontity/mars-theme package AMP-aware. This means that, if you are using the @frontity/amp package and you install this theme, it just works. #825

Fixes

  • Fix problem with CDNs that return the same HTML response for URLs with same queries in different order. #850
  • Add the .DS_Store files to the list of files that a directory where you want to run npx frontity create can contain. #841

Credits

Huge thanks to @michalczaplinski and @luisherranz for helping on this release!

Packages changelog

@frontity/core@1.14.3

Patch Changes

  • e5ca6cd7 #850 Thanks @luisherranz! - Fix problem with CDNs that return the same HTML response for URLs with same queries in different order.

frontity@1.16.1

Patch Changes

  • ba161a58 #841 Thanks @michalczaplinski! - Add the .DS_Store files to the list of files that a directory where you want to run npx frontity create can contain.

@frontity/mars-theme@1.6.0

Minor Changes

  • facd9b2e #825 Thanks @michalczaplinski! - Make the mars-theme “AMP-aware” and clean up the theme to pass the AMP html-validator checks.

@frontity/tiny-router@1.4.3

Patch Changes

  • e5ca6cd7 #850 Thanks @luisherranz! - Fix problem with CDNs that return the same HTML response for URLs with same queries in different order.

Read full topic
